tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or very close to normal limits, except for a mildly elevated chloride. This isolated mild hyperchloremia is likely not clinically significant in the absence of other electrolyte or acid-base disturbances. Renal function, glucose metabolism, and other electrolytes are normal. No acute laboratory concerns identified.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil

name.value: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
